name: Chipotles in Adobo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, combine the chopped onion, chipotle peppers, vinegar, garlic, ketchup, water, and salt.
2. Stir to mix all ingredients evenly.
3. Cover the pan and cook over very low heat for 1 to 2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the chiles are very soft and the liquid has reduced down to about 1 cup.
4. Allow the mixture to cool before using or storing in an airtight container in the refrigerator for several weeks.
5. For chipotle puree, transfer the cooked chipotles and sauce into a blender and blend until smooth.
